element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Long jumps, fall survival, updraft utilization for platforming progression
Basic ranged combat against standard enemies

element_introduction_order.element: Kurt Hectic - Sniper Gun (mounted helmet mode)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Precision ranged combat; requires stationary positioning, introduces tactical trade-offs

element_introduction_order.element: Kurt Hectic - Grenades and Decoy Dummies

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Vertical traversal with resource management (fuel pumps for refueling)
Advanced vertical traversal without resource constraint

element_introduction_order.element: Max - Quad Weapon Mounting (4 guns simultaneously)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: High-impact firepower against heavy enemy encounters

element_introduction_order.element: Dr. Hawkins - Dual Inventory System (left/right hands)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core puzzle mechanic; combining items across hand inventories to create solutions
Progressive puzzle difficulty through object interaction and crafting
Defensive tool with limited combat applications
Required progression through space; increases in precision demand and complexity
Major story moments requiring character-specific tactics

typical_relief_triggers: Safe platforming sections with no enemy pressure
Inventory management and item combination moments
typical_tension_triggers: Precision platforming sequences with fall damage
Sniper mode vulnerability (Kurt stationary, unable to move forward/backward)
Dr. Hawkins low health pool (60 HP) in any combat scenario
Fuel management pressure (Max's standard jet pack depletion)
Boss fights with unique attack patterns
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Variable rhythm with distinct pacing per character: Kurt emphasizes run-and-gun with platforming; Max delivers high-intensity combat with vertical traversal; Dr. Hawkins alternates puzzle-solving calm with low-health combat danger

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory to moderate; players learn character-specific mechanics through level design tailored to each hero's abilities
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating precision demands in platforming; enemy encounters become more complex; puzzle difficulty increases for Dr. Hawkins
difficulty_curve.late_game: High difficulty spike noted; platforming sections criticized as 'too exacting'; boss encounters require mastery of all character tools
notable_spikes: Precision platforming sections (especially Dr. Hawkins levels)
Boss encounters requiring character-specific tactical understanding
Final level (playable with any of three characters, suggesting maximum difficulty and flexibility demand)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level is designed exclusively for one playable character (except final level). Level geometry, enemy placement, and progression paths are tailored to that character's unique abilities, forcing players to master character-specific mechanics.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Final level (first time player choice is available across all three characters)

notable_level_patterns.description: Kurt's ribbon chute enables long jumps, fall survival, and updraft exploitation. Level design emphasizes vertical space navigation and air-based positioning, similar to original MDK.

Max's jet pack introduces resource management pressure. Standard jet pack requires fuel station refueling; atomic variant removes this constraint. Level design likely features fuel pump placement and alternative routes based on jet pack choice.

Dr. Hawkins levels block forward progression with inventory-based puzzles. Two independent inventories (left/right hand) allow cross-inventory combinations but not same-inventory combinations, creating specific puzzle logic paths.

Kurt's sniper mode sacrifices mobility (strafing only, no forward/backward movement) for precision. Level design likely creates scenarios where sniper vulnerability forces tactical positioning choices.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Kurt's levels with long-distance enemy placements
